title: Crease Release Refreshing Clothing Spritz | Anti-Crease Wrinkle Smoothing Fabric Freshener Spray | Natural Fragrances | Cruelty-Free, Made in Britain | Blue Lily & Bergamot Scent
features: Instantly Freshen and Smooth Your Fabrics Anywhere: Say goodbye to wrinkles and hello to fresh fabrics with our Crease Release Spritz. This travel-sized spray is designed to be your ultimate fabric freshener, making your clothes look and smell like they just came out of the laundry.

Anti-Crease Formulation: Smooth out wrinkles effortlessly, perfect for garments that crease easily like silk and cotton. With a compact 100 ml bottle, it's ideal for travel. Whether unpacking your suitcase or prepping for a special event, this spritz is your go-to solution.
Blue Lily & Bergamot Scent: Enjoy a delightful fragrance that leaves your fabrics smelling freshly washed.
Easy to Use: Simply spray directly onto your clothes to release wrinkles and freshen the fabric instantly.
Eco-Friendly: Packaged in an infinitely recyclable bottle, our product is kind to the planet.
Vegan and Cruelty-Free: Proudly made in Britain, our Crease Release Spritz is ethical and sustainable.
description: Product Description Clothing Care Sprays Our clothing care spray range refreshes and protects your wardrobe favourites in many ways, with their unique essential-oil fragrances stunningly scenting the fabrics. Our knitwear mists offer instant natural moth repellent, the steamer water removes fabric wrinkles, and the clothing spritz is a refreshing dry shampoo for your clothes. No. 11 Steamer Water Steaming clothes is an easier alternative to ironing. Our original Steamer Water cleans, refreshes, and decreases garments in just a few spritzes. The light floral fragrance of Blue Lily and Bergamot freshens clothing as well as acting as a cleaning agent. Spray directly on clothes using the the atomiser head, or simply add a few drops into your steamer, so you can wash and iron your garments less. No. 12 Clothing Spritz Our beautifully scented Clothing Spritz targets impurities and removes odours from your garments - like dry shampoo, but for your clothes. Scented with white tea and mint, our spritz has cleaning benefits, so you can wash your garments less - and make your clothes last and smell fresher for longer. Spray directly on clothes. Nos. 13 & 14 Knitwear Mists Our unique Knitwear Mists are scented with either lavender and thyme or cedarwood and vanilla fragrance, acting as a natural moth repellent and extending the life of your precious items. Spray regularly onto your garments for an instant anti-moth impact and a clothing refresh. Plus, the cleaning agent in the Mists means that you don't have to wash your precious knits as often. No. 11 Steamer Water No. 12 Clothing Spritz No.13 Knitwear Mist No.14 Knitwear Mist Scent Bag No.3 Cashmere & Wool Liquid Detergent Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 60 4.0 out of 5 stars 90 4.3 out of 5 stars 116 4.1 out of 5 stars 133 4.0 out of 5 stars 177 4.3 out of 5 stars 275 Price £15.49 £ 15 . 49 £15.49 £ 15 . 49 £15.49 £ 15 . 49 £15.90 £ 15 . 90 £12.00 £ 12 . 00 — no data Features Refreshes and decreases garments. Removes odours, like a dry shampoo for your clothes. Deodorising spray for your knitwear, anti moth fragrance. Deodorising spray for your knitwear, anti moth fragrance. Naturally fragranced scent bag to help deter moths. Gentle liquid detergent ideal for cashmere and wool, anti moth fragrance. How To Use Spray directly on clothes or add a few drops into your fabric steamer. Helps to remove odours. Spray directly onto clothes or add to your steamer. Spray regularly onto knitwear for instant moth protection, reduces need for frequent washes. Spray regularly onto knitwear for instant moth protection, reduces need for frequent washes. Place in drawers or hang in wardrobe to help repel moths - crush bags to release more fragrance. Suitable for either hand washing items or delicate cycle in your washing machine.
